concept.title: Bidirectional COBOL templates
concept.shortdesc: When you create COBOL programs, you can enable bidirectional visual editing.

conbody.p: If you create COBOL programs that enable bidirectional visual editing, the following conditions are set:

ul.li: The standard editors are replaced with editors that you can use to enter bidirectional data in Visual mode.

Templates are generated in Smart Logical format. This format enables correct display of bidirectional strings in any logical editor. Smart Logical files must be converted to Visual format when they are uploaded to the host.
